name: Brunswick Stew
recipeInstructions:
1. Sprinkle chicken with 1 teaspoon of salt and paprika.
2. Heat oil in a deep kettle or large pot over medium-high heat.
3. Brown the chicken on all sides, turning off the heat when done.
4. Add onions and green pepper to the pot; cook until onions are transparent.
5. Pour in water and canned tomatoes (undrained); stir in parsley, remaining salt, Tabasco sauce, and Worcestershire sauce.
6. Bring the mixture to a boil over medium-high heat.
7. Reduce heat to low, cover, and simmer for 30 minutes.
8. Add corn and lima beans; cook for an additional 20 minutes.
9. Stir in mashed potatoes and cook for another 10 minutes until everything is heated through.
